/usr/bin/c++ -Os -g -DNDEBUG "CMakeFiles/uart-sixlowpan-ping.dir/uart-sixlowpan-ping.cc.o" -o /home/dhruba/ns-allinone-3.45/ns-3.45/build/contrib/uart-net-device/examples/ns3.45-uart-sixlowpan-ping-default   -L/home/dhruba/ns-allinone-3.45/ns-3.45/build/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/home/dhruba/ns-allinone-3.45/ns-3.45/build/lib -Wl,--no-as-needed /home/dhruba/ns-allinone-3.45/ns-3.45/build/lib/libns3.45-uart-net-device-default.so /home/dhruba/ns-allinone-3.45/ns-3.45/build/lib/libns3.45-sixlowpan-default.so /home/dhruba/ns-allinone-3.45/ns-3.45/build/lib/libns3.45-lr-wpan-default.so /home/dhruba/ns-allinone-3.45/ns-3.45/build/lib/libns3.45-internet-apps-default.so -Wl,--as-needed /home/dhruba/ns-allinone-3.45/ns-3.45/build/lib/libns3.45-spectrum-default.so /home/dhruba/ns-allinone-3.45/ns-3.45/build/lib/libns3.45-propagation-default.so /home/dhruba/ns-allinone-3.45/ns-3.45/build/lib/libns3.45-mobility-default.so /home/dhruba/ns-allinone-3.45/ns-3.45/build/lib/libns3.45-antenna-default.so /home/dhruba/ns-allinone-3.45/ns-3.45/build/lib/libns3.45-internet-default.so /home/dhruba/ns-allinone-3.45/ns-3.45/build/lib/libns3.45-bridge-default.so /home/dhruba/ns-allinone-3.45/ns-3.45/build/lib/libns3.45-traffic-control-default.so /home/dhruba/ns-allinone-3.45/ns-3.45/build/lib/libns3.45-network-default.so /home/dhruba/ns-allinone-3.45/ns-3.45/build/lib/libns3.45-stats-default.so /home/dhruba/ns-allinone-3.45/ns-3.45/build/lib/libns3.45-core-default.so -Wl,--no-as-needed -Wl,--as-needed
